_meta.purpose: AI-agent module ownership and maturity registry. Agents consult this before modifying any file.

maturity_levels.STABLE: Well-established; rarely changes; requires strong justification for modification.
maturity_levels.EVOLVING: Active refactoring target; modification expected; follow STATUS.md for phase context.
maturity_levels.EXPERIMENTAL: New or uncertain; API may change; not yet stabilized.

domain_legend.TOOLS: CNC cutting tool master data domain
domain_legend.UI-PLATFORM: Shared UI infrastructure reusable across domains

modules.description: Application entry point; single-instance IPC server, CLI args, splash screen, DB initialization, navigation routing.
Centralized config; paths, tool types, icon mappings, DB constants, UI sizing, i18n directories.
modules.deprecated_content: Legacy runtime directory migration (~lines 50-57) for backward-compatible 'NTX Shared Runtime' path; remove after Phase 8.

modules.description: Package marker; no exports.
Tool database abstraction layer; wraps BaseSqliteDatabase and applies tool schema migrations.
Jaw database abstraction layer; lightweight SQLite wrapper with separate schema migrations.
DB schema migrations and normalization; tool/jaw schema evolution, component item transforms, legacy format compatibility.
modules.deprecated_content: _legacy_component_items_from_row() — retain for migration compatibility; remove after schema stabilizes (Phase 8).

modules.description: Package marker; no exports.
Shim: re-exports Tool, AdditionalPart, GeometryProfile from shared.models.tool. Temporary compatibility module.
modules.deprecated_content: Entire file is a shim. Remove when all callers import from shared.models.tool directly.

modules.description: Shim: re-exports Jaw from shared.models.jaw. Temporary compatibility module.
modules.deprecated_content: Entire file is a shim. Remove when all callers import from shared.models.jaw directly.

modules.description: Package marker; no exports.
Core tool business logic; CRUD, search, filtering, normalization, component/measurement overlay management, legacy format conversion.
modules.deprecated_content: _component_items_from_legacy() and _legacy_fields_from_component_items() — backward compatibility for old component storage format; remove after Phase 8.

modules.description: Core jaw business logic; CRUD, search/filter by spindle side, measurement overlay normalization.
Excel export/import for tools; styled workbook generation, multi-sheet layout, field mapping, backward-compatible import.
modules.deprecated_content: Legacy field mapping (GENERAL_FIELDS vs EXPORT_BASE_FIELDS) and backward-compatible import path handling; refactor in Phase 7.

modules.description: Simple JSON settings persistence; load and save user preferences to file.
Package marker; no exports.
Primary application window; page navigation, module switching, IPC request handling, window state, tooltips, deep linking.
modules.deprecated_content: Fallback for legacy modules directory (~line 1240); remove after Phase 8.

modules.description: Tool catalog and detail view; search, filtering by type/head, CRUD dialogs, list view with delegates, component/spare parts, preview integration, batch selector.
Jaw catalog and assignment interface; mirrors home_page for jaws; catalog list, detail, preview, measurements, selector slots, batch ops.
Tool export/import UI; field mapping widget, column association, Excel file dialogs, data transformation.
Jaw export UI; mirrors export_page for jaws; contains _JawToolServiceAdapter and _JawExportServiceAdapter to reuse tool export logic.
modules.notes: _JawToolServiceAdapter and _JawExportServiceAdapter are intentional (not legacy); documented in docs/deprecations.json as INTENTIONAL_ADAPTER.

modules.description: User preferences dialog; language, theme, model root path.
Tool editor dialog; multi-tab CRUD (general, models, components, measurements); batch/group edit; payload adapter; component picker/linking.
Jaw editor dialog; field inputs, model tabs, batch/group edit modes.
QPainter-based delegate for tool catalog rows; icon rendering, text elision, responsive column visibility.
QPainter-based delegate for jaw catalog rows; mirrors tool_catalog_delegate architecture.
Measurement editor dialog orchestrator; builds forms and delegates list/pick/distance/diameter state to coordinators under ui/measurement_editor/coordinators/.

Stateful coordinators extracted from measurement_editor_dialog.py: list_manager (measurement list CRUD/selection), pick_coordinator (pick_target/dist_pick_stage/diam_pick_stage state + point-picked dispatch), distance_editor, diameter_editor, axis_overlay, preview_coordinator.

Support modules extracted from tool_editor_dialog.py in April 2026 refactor: component_picker_dialog.py, spare_parts_table_coordinator.py, component_linking_dialog.py, plus measurement/transform/tool-type rules.
15 support modules for home_page.py; selector state machine, batch actions, detail panel, component display, spare parts rendering.
modules.phase_relevance: Phase 4 (migrate into domain_modules/tools_module/ — expect significant reduction)

modules.description: 8 support modules for jaw_page.py; mirrors home_page_support for jaws domain.
modules.phase_relevance: Phase 5 (migrate into domain_modules/jaws_module/ — expect moderate reduction)

modules.description: Shared UI helpers: EditorDialogMixin, ModelTableMixin, PreviewController, EditorModelsTab, SelectorPanelBuilders, EditorTemplate, ModelTableHelpers.
Custom widgets: CommonWidgets, PartsTable, ColorPickerDialog.
Measurement subsystem (~20 files): models (distance, diameter, radius, angle), forms, controllers, utilities (coordinates, axis_math), preview_sync bridge.
